title: Jappa Farming Revamp
description: Jappa Farming Texture Pack Revamped With New Tools For Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# Release

This is a revamp of Jappa Farming Tools from 1.8.9 updated to 1.21 by a external user 

The Pack Is Updated To Work With The New Mk System For Tools

You Can Toggle On/Off Any Of These Textures By Default All Are **On**

/catharsis config Jappa

# Textures

<details>
<summary>1. Farming Tools</summary>

1. - Eucid's Wheat Hoe Mk. 1-3
  
2. - Gauss Carrot Hoe Mk. 1-3

3. - Pythagorean Potato Hoe Mk. 1-3

4. - Pumpkin Dicer Mk. 1-3

5. - Melon Dicer Mk. 1-3

6. - Fungi Cutter Mk. 1-3

7. - Cactus Knife Mk. 1-3

8. - Turing Sugar Cane Hoe Mk. 1-3

9. - Newton Nether Wart Hoe Mk. 1-3

10. - Cocoa Chopper Mk. 1-3

11. - Eclipse Hoe Mk. 1-3 [MoonFlower]

12. - Eclipse Hoe Mk. 1-3 [SunFlower]

13. - Wild Rose Hoe Mk. 1-3

</details>

<details>
<summary>2. Enchanted Books</summary>

1. - Turbo Wheat I-VII

2. - Turbo Carrot I-VII

3. - Turbo Potato I-VII

4. - Turbo Pumpkin I-VII

5. - Turbo Melon I-VII

6. - Turbo Mushrooms I-VII

7. - Turbo Cactus I-VII

8. - Turbo Cane I-VII

9. - Turbo Warts I-VII

10. - Turbo Coco I-VII

11. - Turbo Moonflower I-VII

12. - Turbo Sunflower I-VII

13. - Turbo Rose I-VII

</details>

<details>
<summary>3. Extra's</summary>

1. - Sam's Scythe

2. - Garden Scythe

3. - Basic Gardening Hoe

4. - Advanced Gardening Hoe

5. - Basic Gardening Axe

6. - Advanced Gardening Axe

7. - Hoe_Of_Great_Tilling

8. - Hoe_Of_Greater_Tilling

9. - Hoe_Of_Greatest_Tilling

</details>



# Details

Each Tool Has 4 Variants 1 For Each Mk Tier And A Fourth Unlocked Once Reached Cultivating 10

Any Questions Or Need Help Feel Free To Dm Me   **westdevs**   Or Ingame   **J0ppas**

Original Creator - bluntfield

# More To Come
